description: No FastAPI app that combines FastAPIProtocolRouter + FabricHealthEndpoints into a runnable Gateway Mode service with endpoints: POST /send
column14: Create src/application/fabric_service.py that creates a FastAPI() app, includes FastAPIProtocolRouter routes and FabricHealthEndpoints, and wires it into main.py as an optional entry-point

description: RemoteGatewayAdapter (httpx.AsyncClient-based ICommunicationGateway) exists only in .docs/usage_integration_examples/gateway_mode/remote_adapter.py not in src/
proposed_solution: Copy .docs/usage_integration_examples/gateway_mode/remote_adapter.py -> src/application/remote_adapter.py; add liveness_check/readiness_check to ICommunicationGateway

description: No pip-installable package (pyproject.toml/setup.py) for FabricClient ICommunicationGateway or RemoteGatewayAdapter
proposed_solution: Create pyproject.toml with fabric-sdk package; export ICommunicationGateway FabricClient RemoteGatewayAdapter as public API; add proper __init__.py exports

description: No documented versioning strategy; /v1 prefix exists ad-hoc in FastAPIProtocolRouter but no Accept-Version header deprecation policy or migration docs
proposed_solution: Define versioning strategy doc; add /api/v1 prefix consistently; add optional Accept-Version header support; document breaking-change policy

description: No auto-generated OpenAPI docs because no FastAPI() app exists to aggregate routers; individual routers lack Pydantic response models
proposed_solution: Create FastAPI app in fabric_service.py with include_router; add Pydantic request/response models for each endpoint; enable /docs and /redoc

description: RemoteGatewayAdapter (.docs only) has timeout=30.0 but zero retry logic; internal RetryEngine and AsyncCircuitBreaker exist in src/ but are not exposed to the SDK client
proposed_solution: Add RetryDecorator or httpx mounts with retry transport to RemoteGatewayAdapter; optionally expose AsyncCircuitBreaker for gateway connection health

description: No src/contracts/ directory — README conftest.py and usage examples import from 'contracts.communication_gateway' but actual file is at src/wiring/contracts/communication_gateway.py
proposed_solution: Add src/contracts/__init__.py with re-exports from wiring.contracts or update all references to use from wiring.contracts.communication_gateway
